composite_results.note: Best results from iteration 3 (TS evals) and 3b (Go evals with refined export audit step)

skill_changes_from_original: Added 5 architectural boundary violation checks (dependency direction, unnecessary exports, knowledge direction in comments, Law of Demeter, circular dependencies)
Added test boundary check (tests through public interface vs reaching into internals)
Added 2 explicit mandatory scan steps at end of Section 2 (grep for TODO/HACK/XXX/FIXME markers, audit new exports for cross-package references)

iteration_history.issue: LoD test used struct field access not method chains
Agent variance on TODO and unnecessary exports; TS clean had inconsistent TODO fixture
Export audit step caused false positive on Go clean DI interfaces
None. Refined export audit wording resolved false positive.
